mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(cardTime, '%Y-%m-%d') as clickDate, COUNT(*) as count FROM member WHERE cardTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(cardTime, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY clickDate ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET memberChange = (select SUM(rechargeMoney) from recharge where memberNo = #{memberNo}) - #{totalBuy} WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: Select COUNT(*) as dataTotal from member
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET memberIntegral = (memberIntegral - #{price}) WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
UPDATE member SET memberPower = #{memberPower} WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: select * from member where memberName like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or memberPhone like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') limit #{page},#{size};
select COUNT(*) as dataTotal from member where memberName like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or memberPhone like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') ;
select * from member where memberPhone = #{memberPhone} and memberPassword = #{memberPassword}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET memberPassword = #{memberPassword} WHERE memberPhone = #{memberPhone}
UPDATE member SET memberChange = (memberChange - #{coursePrice}) WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.select: select memberIntegral from member where memberNo = #{memberNo}
select memberChange from member where memberNo = #{memberNo}
select memberPower from member where memberNo = #{memberNo}
select SUM(rechargeMoney) from recharge where memberNo = #{memberNo}
